Rules.InvariantScript:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Notes", Icon: Icon.Note, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People}
)
If(Self.Layout = Layout.Horizontal, Min(280, Self.Width - 60), Min(280, Self.Height - 60))

Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
If(
    !IsBlank(
        LookUp(
            colCdsJobEntries,
            'Job Entry' = gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Job Entry',
            Notes
        )
    ),
    gblAppStyles.Status.Info,
    gblAppStyles.Status.Neutral
)

AddColumns(
    Sort(
        AddColumns(
            Filter(
                colCdsWindowMeasurements,
                Job.Job = gblRecordJobCurrent.Job,
                Status <> gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Status.Inactive,
                Type = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Type.Tech
            ) As currentWindowMeasurement,
            JobEntry,
            LookUp(
                colCdsJobEntries,
                'Job Entry'=currentWindowMeasurement.'Job Entry'.'Job Entry'
            )
        ),
        'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number',
        SortOrder.Ascending
    ),
    WindowStyle,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowChoices,
        'Window Choice'=LookUp(
            colCdsJobEntries,
            'Job Entry'=JobEntry.'Job Entry',
            'Window Choice'
        ).'Window Choice',
        Style
    ).Name,
    WindowModel,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowChoices,
        'Window Choice'=LookUp(
            colCdsJobEntries,
            'Job Entry'=JobEntry.'Job Entry',
            'Window Choice'
        ).'Window Choice',
        Model
    ).Name,
    Manufacturer,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowChoices,
        'Window Choice'=LookUp(
            colCdsJobEntries,
            'Job Entry'=JobEntry.'Job Entry',
            'Window Choice'
        ).'Window Choice',
        Manufacturer
    ).'Account Name',
    TechMeasurement,
    Name,
    SalesMeasurement,
    LookUp(colCdsJobEntries, 'Job Entry'=JobEntry.'Job Entry', 'Measurement (Sales)').Name
)

If(
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number'),
    "Mull " & ThisItem.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number'
) & If(
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number') And !IsBlank(ThisItem.'Lead Test: Exterior Result'),
    ", "
) & If(
    ThisItem.'Lead Test: Exterior Result' = 'Yes No Null'.Yes Or ThisItem.'Lead Test: Interior Result' = 'Yes No Null'.Yes,
    "Contains Lead",
    ThisItem.'Lead Test: Exterior Result' = 'Yes No Null'.No Or ThisItem.'Lead Test: Interior Result' = 'Yes No Null'.No,
    "No Lead",
    "Not Tested"
)

Set(
    gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_,
    LookUp(
        colCdsJobEntries,
        'Job Entry' = ThisItem.'Job Entry'
    )
);
ClearCollect(
    colProjectSidebar,
    Ungroup(
        Table(
            {
                varMenuItems: RenameColumns(
                    Table(
                        {
                            ID: gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Job Entry',
                            Name: Index(
                                ForAll(Split(
                                    gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Window Choice'.Name,
                                    " > "
                                ), {Result: ThisRecord.Value}),
                                2
                            ).Result,
                            Category: "Job Entry",
                            Description: Index(
                                ForAll(Split(
                                    gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Window Choice'.Name,
                                    " > "
                                ), {Result: ThisRecord.Value}),
                                1
                            ).Result,
                            Screen: 'Windows Screen',
                            Type: "Window Choice",
                            Image: 'dblhungw-2',
                            ImageDisabled: 'dblhungw-2'
                        }
                    ),
                    Name,
                    Title
                )
            },
            {
                varMenuItems: ShowColumns(
                    RenameColumns(
                        AddColumns(
                            Filter(
                                colCdsWindowMeasurements,
                                'Job Entry'.'Job Entry' = gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Job Entry',
                                Type = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Type.Tech,
                                Status <> gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Status.Inactive
                            ),
                            Category,
                            "Window Measurement",
                            Description,
                            If(
                                And(
                                    'United Inches (UI)'=0,
                                    !IsBlank(gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Measurement (Sales)')
                                ),
                                "Sales Measurement",
                                "Tech Measurement"
                            ),
                            Image,
                            gblAppIcons.Ruler,
                            ImageDisabled,
                            gblAppIcons.RulerDisabled,
                            Screen,
                            'Measure Window Screen',
                            Title,
                            If(
                                And(
                                    'United Inches (UI)'=0,
                                    !IsBlank(gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Measurement (Sales)')
                                ),
                                $"{Text(gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Measurement (Sales)'.Width)}"" x {Text(gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Measurement (Sales)'.Height)}""",
                                $"{RoundDown(Width, 0)} {Switch(
                                    Mod(Width, 1),
                                    0, "",
                                    0.125, "1/8",
                                    0.250, "1/4",
                                    0.375, "3/8",
                                    0.500, "1/2",
                                    0.625, "5/8",
                                    0.750, "3/4",
                                    0.875, "7/8"
                                )}"" x {RoundDown(Height, 0)} {Switch(
                                    Mod(Height, 1),
                                    0, "",
                                    0.125, "1/8",
                                    0.250, "1/4",
                                    0.375, "3/8",
                                    0.500, "1/2",
                                    0.625, "5/8",
                                    0.750, "3/4",
                                    0.875, "7/8"
                                )}"""
                            )
                        ),
                        'Window Measurement',
                        ID
                    ),
                    ID,
                    Title,
                    Category,
                    Description,
                    Screen,
                    Image,
                    ImageDisabled
                )
            }
        ),
        varMenuItems
    )
);
ClearCollect(
    colProjectSidebar,
    Filter(
        colProjectSidebar,
        !IsBlank(Title)
    )
);
Set(
    gblProjectSidebarItemCurrent,
    First(colProjectSidebar)
);
Navigate(
    'Windows Screen',
    BorderStyle.None
);

With(
    {
        varCompletedWindowMeasurements: CountRows(
            Filter(
                colCdsWindowMeasurements,
                Job.Job = gblRecordJobCurrent.Job,
                'Job Entry'.'Job Entry' = ThisItem.'Job Entry',
                Completed = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Completed.Yes,
                Type = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Type.Tech,
                Status <> gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Status.Inactive
            )
        ),
        varAllWindowMeasurements: CountRows(
            Filter(
                colCdsWindowMeasurements,
                Job.Job = gblRecordJobCurrent.Job,
                'Job Entry'.'Job Entry' = ThisItem.'Job Entry',
                Type = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Type.Tech,
                Status <> gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Status.Inactive
            )
        )
    },
    If(
        And(
            varCompletedWindowMeasurements = varAllWindowMeasurements,
            varCompletedWindowMeasurements <> 0
        ),
        gblAppStyles.Status.Success,
        gblAppStyles.Status.Neutral
    )
)

CountRows(
    Filter(
        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
        'Job Entry'.'Job Entry'=ThisItem.'Job Entry',
        Type=gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Type.Tech,
        Status<>gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Status.Inactive
    )
)
ThisItem.'Room: Type' & Char(13) & ThisItem.'Room: Floor' & If(!IsBlank(ThisItem.'Room: Description'),Char(13) & ThisItem.'Room: Description')

"No rooms were found for this job
"
